title: How I make my AI Agent remember everything
summary: JavaScript Mastery covers techniques for enabling AI agents to retain and recall information across interactions. The content demonstrates practical implementation approaches for agent memory systems.
writeup: JavaScript Mastery walks through techniques for giving AI agents memory that persists across interactions, so an agent can recall information rather than start fresh each session. The video focuses on practical implementation: context management and knowledge retention as the building blocks of an agent memory system. This matters for anyone building agents that need continuity over multiple exchanges instead of stateless one-off responses.
